subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the Call of Him Who is wronged. Verily, He calleth thee and maketh mention of thee with that which diffuseth the fragrance of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ان استمع ندآء المظلوم انه ینادیک و یذکرک بما یتضوع منع عرف البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
